findings.message: Phase 2.1 step 1 reads designer-experience.md by project category before asking the user. Graceful degradation present: 'Если секция пуста или файл отсутствует — продолжить без неё.'

findings.check: style-profile matching after mood determination (Quick Lookup table)
findings.message: Phase 2.1 step 4 reads only the matching section from style-profiles.md using Quick Lookup table for mood+category matching. Decision 4 (read only matching section, not the whole file) is correctly implemented.
Phase 0 update branch reads .design-system/taste-profile.md with graceful degradation: 'If file is missing — continue without it.'
Section '### Двухслойные описания' is present in Phase 2 with correct ordering: human-readable first, then technical. Motivation for the pattern is provided.
All 4 new Final Check items present: designer-experience read check, style-profile used check, taste-profile read at update check, two-layer descriptions check.

Both new references use correct relative paths: designer-experience.md at ../../shared/design-references/designer-experience.md and style-profiles.md at ../../shared/design-references/style-profiles.md.

findings.check: no regression — all original phases and checkpoints preserved
findings.message: All 5 original checkpoints preserved (Phase 0, 1, 2, 3, 4). All phase headers intact. No existing content removed.

designer-experience.md: 'Если секция пуста или файл отсутствует — продолжить без неё.' taste-profile.md: 'If file is missing — continue without it.' style-profiles.md: 'Если точного совпадения нет — выбрать ближайший подходящий профиль.'

Phase 2.1 step 1 instructs the agent to determine category (landing/webapp/admin/portfolio) before asking about mood. This is a silent inference step — the spec requires reading experience before the interview question, which is satisfied.

summary: SKILL.md passes all task-6 acceptance criteria. All three new capabilities are correctly integrated: designer-experience reading by category in Phase 2.1 step 1 (before interview), style-profile matching via Quick Lookup after mood determination in Phase 2.1 step 4, and taste-profile reading in Phase 0 update branch. Two-layer description instruction is present as a named subsection in Phase 2 with correct human-readable-first ordering. Four new Final Check items cover all new behaviors. Relative paths to both shared reference files are correct. All original phases (0–4) and all 5 checkpoints are preserved without modification. Graceful degradation is implemented for all three new file reads.
